name: ABOMINATION

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (fortitude) abilities of other models.

abilities.name: Unmade
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, enemy models within (r)3" with an Injured token are dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Strange Appendages
actions.effects: If the target is not a peon and is killed, this model may summon an Abomination within 1" of it.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Severe Injury
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has an Injured token, deal +1 damage to it. Otherwise, it gains an Injured token.

actions.name: Concentrated Deformation
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target two other friendly Abominations. Kill this model and the targets.
actions.effects: Before removing this model, summon a Desolation Engine with 8 health within range.

extraction_notes: STN: 6 notation visible below creature image
